narrative:
Gibsonburg Ex Vill Sd (Sandusky) exempted village school district has 3,367 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.3 percentage points.
